defects.name: Water Stain on Ceiling
defects.description: Visible brown or dark discoloration on the ceiling suggesting past or active moisture intrusion.
defects.embed_text: Water stain on ceiling. Brown/dark ceiling discoloration from moisture intrusion or leak. Moisture remediation.

defects.name: Peeling or Discolored Paint
defects.description: Paint that is peeling, bubbling, cracked, or visibly aged.
defects.embed_text: Peeling or discolored paint. Flaking, bubbling, cracked, aged paint. Prep and repaint.

defects.name: Visible Mold or Mildew
defects.description: Dark, fuzzy, or patchy growth on surfaces indicative of active or past moisture problems.
defects.embed_text: Visible mold or mildew. Patchy/dark growth on surfaces from moisture. Mold remediation and moisture control.

defects.name: Drywall Damage or Cracks
defects.description: Cracks, holes, nail pops, or uneven drywall indicating settling, impact damage, or poor repairs.
defects.embed_text: Drywall damage or cracks. Holes, cracks, nail pops, uneven drywall. Patch and repair.

defects.name: Ceiling Cracks or Sagging
defects.description: Cracks, separation at joints, or sagging areas in ceiling indicating movement or moisture damage.
defects.embed_text: Ceiling cracks or sagging. Separation, sagging ceiling areas. Investigate and repair ceiling/drywall.

defects.name: Worn or Stained Carpet
defects.description: Carpet that is visibly dirty, stained, frayed, or heavily worn.
defects.embed_text: Worn or stained carpet. Dirty, stained, frayed carpet. Replace carpet.

defects.name: Scratched or Damaged Hard Flooring
defects.description: Hardwood/laminate/vinyl/tile with scratches, chips, warping, broken tiles, or visible damage.
defects.embed_text: Scratched or damaged hard flooring. Scratches, scuffs, chips, warping, broken tiles. Flooring replacement or repair.

defects.name: Trip Hazard or Unlevel Floor
defects.description: Uneven flooring, loose thresholds, or abrupt height changes posing a trip risk or indicating settlement.
defects.embed_text: Trip hazard or unlevel floor. Uneven floors, loose thresholds, height changes. Correct flooring/transition.

defects.name: Damaged or Rotted Exterior Siding/Trim
defects.description: Exterior siding/trim showing rot, warping, cracks, missing sections, or deterioration.
defects.embed_text: Damaged or rotted exterior siding or trim. Rot, warping, cracking, missing sections. Exterior repair.

defects.name: Damaged or Aged Roof Shingles
defects.description: Missing, curling, patchy, worn shingles or debris suggesting reduced remaining life.
defects.embed_text: Damaged or aged roof shingles. Missing/curling/worn shingles, moss, debris. Roof repair.

defects.name: Damaged or Unsafe Deck/Porch
defects.description: Deck/porch/stairs with loose, rotted, or missing boards or railings appearing unsafe.
defects.embed_text: Damaged or unsafe deck or porch. Loose/rotted/missing boards or railings. Exterior repair.

defects.name: Broken or Fogged Windows
defects.description: Cracked glass, damaged frames, missing panes, or fogged double-pane windows indicating failed seals.
defects.embed_text: Broken or fogged windows. Cracked glass, fogged panes, failed seals, damaged frames. Window repair or replacement.

defects.name: Damaged or Outdated Cabinets
defects.description: Cabinets with visible wear, damaged doors/drawers, water staining, or dated style.
defects.embed_text: Damaged or outdated cabinets. Worn or dated cabinetry, damaged doors/drawers. Cabinet repair, refinish, or replacement.

defects.name: Damaged Countertops
defects.description: Countertops with burns, chips, cracks, swollen seams, or missing sections.
defects.embed_text: Damaged countertops. Chips, cracks, burns, swollen seams. Countertop replacement.

defects.name: Damaged Tile or Grout
defects.description: Broken/loose/missing tile or grout that may allow moisture intrusion.
defects.embed_text: Damaged tile or grout. Cracked, loose, missing tiles or grout. Tile/grout repair to prevent moisture intrusion.

defects.name: Appliance Damage or Missing
defects.description: Key appliances missing, visibly broken, significantly aged or neglected.
defects.embed_text: Appliance damage or missing. Missing/broken/aged kitchen appliances. Replace appliances.

defects.name: Leaking or Stained Plumbing Fixtures
defects.description: Leaks, corrosion, staining, or mineral buildup at sinks/toilets/tubs/showers.
defects.embed_text: Leaking or stained plumbing fixtures. Leaks, corrosion, staining, buildup at sink/toilet/tub/shower. Plumbing repair.

defects.name: Stained or Damaged Bath Fixtures
defects.description: Tubs/showers/toilets with heavy staining, chipped enamel, or worn finishes.
defects.embed_text: Stained or damaged bath fixtures. Worn finishes, staining, chipped enamel. Fixture update or replacement.

defects.name: Visible Electrical Risks
defects.description: Exposed wiring, missing covers, scorch marks, overloaded strips, unsafe components.
defects.embed_text: Visible electrical risks. Exposed wiring, missing outlet covers, scorch marks, overloaded power strips. Electrical repair.

defects.name: Missing or Damaged Handrails/Guardrails
defects.description: Missing/loose/broken railings on stairs, balconies, decks.
defects.embed_text: Missing or damaged handrails or guardrails. Loose/broken/missing railings. Safety repair.

defects.name: Basement or Garage Damage
defects.description: Cracking, moisture intrusion, efflorescence, or structural wear in basement/garage walls or floors.
defects.embed_text: Basement or garage damage. Cracks, moisture intrusion, efflorescence, structural wear. Structural repair evaluation.

defects.name: Major Foundation or Settlement Signs
defects.description: Large step cracks, sloped floors, misaligned doors/windows, signs of notable settlement.
defects.embed_text: Major foundation or settlement signs. Step cracks, sloped floors, misaligned doors/windows. Foundation/structure evaluation.

defects.name: Visible Pest or Rodent Evidence
defects.description: Droppings, chewed materials, nests, or clear signs of insects/rodents.
defects.embed_text: Visible pest or rodent evidence. Droppings, nests, chewed materials. Pest control and cleanup.

defects.name: Standing Water or Poor Grading
defects.description: Standing water, negative grading, saturated soil near structure increasing moisture risk.
defects.embed_text: Standing water or poor grading. Water pooling, negative grading near foundation. Drainage and grading correction.

defects.name: Driveway or Walkway Cracking/Settlement
defects.description: Cracks, heaving, spalling, or settlement in concrete/paved areas impacting safety or curb appeal.
defects.embed_text: Driveway or walkway cracking/settlement. Cracks, heaving, spalling. Concrete repair.

defects.name: Clogged or Damaged Gutters/Downspouts
defects.description: Gutters/downspouts clogged, sagging, disconnected, or dumping water near foundation.
defects.embed_text: Clogged or damaged gutters/downspouts. Sagging, clogged, disconnected gutters. Gutter repair/cleaning.

defects.name: Trees or Vegetation Too Close to Structure
defects.description: Vegetation contacting or very close to siding/roof/foundation promoting moisture, pests, or damage.
defects.embed_text: Trees or vegetation too close to structure. Overgrowth contacting siding/roof. Trim and clear vegetation.

upgrades.name: Outdated Kitchen Finishes
upgrades.description: Older cabinetry, counters, appliances, or finishes that would benefit from modernization.
upgrades.embed_text: Outdated kitchen finishes. Dated cabinetry, countertops, appliances. Kitchen update and modernization.

upgrades.name: Outdated Bathroom Finishes
upgrades.description: Older tile, vanity, fixtures, or layout where an update would improve appeal.
upgrades.embed_text: Outdated bathroom finishes. Dated tile, vanity, fixtures. Bathroom update.

upgrades.name: Outdated Flooring Style
upgrades.description: Flooring is clean but visually outdated (older carpet, laminate, linoleum, dated tile).
upgrades.embed_text: Outdated flooring style. Visually dated carpet/laminate/linoleum/tile. Flooring update.

upgrades.name: Outdated Lighting Fixtures
upgrades.description: Older ceiling lights, fans, sconces, or track lighting where modern fixtures improve the look.
upgrades.embed_text: Outdated lighting fixtures. Dated ceiling light or ceiling fan. Fixture update.

upgrades.name: Paint Refresh Opportunity
upgrades.description: Older or highly personalized colors where repainting in modern neutrals would improve appeal.
upgrades.embed_text: Paint refresh recommended. Repaint interior to modern neutral colors.

upgrades.name: Landscape Improvement
upgrades.description: Exterior/yard appears sparse, overgrown, or tired; could improve with landscaping cleanup.
upgrades.embed_text: Landscape improvement. Yard cleanup, trimming, refresh for curb appeal.

upgrades.name: Curb Appeal Upgrade
upgrades.description: Entry/porch/facade could benefit from cosmetic updates (paint, hardware, accents).
upgrades.embed_text: Curb appeal upgrade. Improve entry, porch, exterior accents. Exterior cosmetic updates.

upgrades.name: Unfinished Basement
upgrades.description: Unfinished basement suggests opportunity for added space through future finishing.
upgrades.embed_text: Unfinished basement. Opportunity to finish space and add living area.

upgrades.name: Staging or Decluttering Opportunity
upgrades.description: Rooms appear cluttered/personalized; decluttering or staging improves perception.
upgrades.embed_text: Staging or decluttering opportunity. Clean up clutter to improve presentation.
